What the system checks: File type is allowed, file is stored, upload batch is created, row counts are tracked, accepted and rejected rows are recorded
Result / Flag shown: Upload batch status, row count, accepted rows, rejected rows, error summary
Notes to amend: Every import should stay tied to an upload batch

What the system checks: Only the Super Admin can access the system; no agent login is included
Notes to amend: Keep this as Super Admin only for now

What the system checks: Booking Reference is used as the main booking key
Notes to amend: Master report is not the trusted source for receipts, supplier paid, or profit

What the system checks: Short numeric references are converted to OTC format, for example 3 becomes OTC-00003 and 102 becomes OTC-00102
Notes to amend: This helps match old human reports to system records

What the system checks: Status is normalised, for example CHG/changed becomes amended/live and CAN/cancelled becomes cancelled
Notes to amend: Add more status codes here if Traveltek uses other abbreviations

What the system checks: Gross booking value is stored from Total Cost/Gross
Notes to amend: Used as booking value, not as money received

What the system checks: Expected supplier nett is stored from Nett
Notes to amend: Supplier paid itself still comes from TAPs, not the master report

What the system checks: Outstanding customer and supplier figures can be stored for comparison only
Notes to amend: Do not use these as the trusted money position

What the system checks: Total Received, Paid supplier, and projected profit are excluded from trusted logic
Notes to amend: This protects against relying on Traveltek finance fields

Source / Upload Type: Elements field is checked for flight, accommodation, cruise, extras, and package indicators
What the system checks: Review logic
Trusted for calculations?: Product flags and ATOL review status
Result / Flag shown: Element wording may need expanding over time

What the system checks: Flight plus accommodation is marked ATOL required; flight plus another element is marked for ATOL review
Notes to amend: This is a review flag, not legal advice

What the system checks: OTC references are marked OTC; LeMieux-style references are marked LeMieux/review
Notes to amend: Add exact LeMieux prefixes if needed

What the system checks: TAPs exports with date/blank lines before the header are detected automatically
Notes to amend: This prevents the missing booking ref/payment value error

What the system checks: Each supplier payment line is stored separately, not merged
Notes to amend: Important where a booking has multiple supplier payments

What the system checks: Payment rows are matched to bookings by Booking Reference
Notes to amend: Unmatched rows become exceptions

What the system checks: Duplicate supplier payments are detected using source, booking ref, supplier, payment date, method, amount, and VAT
Notes to amend: Useful because TAPs may not give a unique ID

What the system checks: Expected Supplier Nett minus TAPs supplier payments equals supplier balance due
Result / Flag shown: Paid in full, partial, unpaid, overpaid, variance
Notes to amend: TAPs is treated as actual supplier payment source

What the system checks: Supplier paid more than expected supplier nett is flagged
Notes to amend: Insurance costs are also considered in exception logic where active

What the system checks: Supplier balance still due after departure is flagged
Result / Flag shown: Supplier balance due after departure exception
Notes to amend: Helps find late supplier liabilities

What the system checks: TT supplier payment rows are stored separately from TAPs
Notes to amend: Used to cross-check human-entered values against actual TAPs

What the system checks: TAPs total is compared with TT human input total by booking
Notes to amend: Shows where human input differs from actual supplier payments

What the system checks: SINGs/Felloh customer receipts are treated as trusted customer payment source
Notes to amend: This is the trusted customer receipt source

What the system checks: Payments are matched by booking reference first
Result / Flag shown: Matched by booking ref or unmatched
Notes to amend: Unmatched receipts need review

What the system checks: If no booking ref exists, customer name plus amount/date can be used as lower confidence matching
Notes to amend: These should be reviewed before relying on them

What the system checks: Actual card fee is used where provided
Notes to amend: Actual fee always beats estimated fee

What the system checks: If actual fee is missing, estimated fee can be calculated from payment method rules
Notes to amend: Estimated fees should be replaced when actual fees are available

Source / Upload Type: Customer Payments TT human input / Bank Master Data.xlsx
What the system checks: TT spreadsheet reads Booking Reference, Customer, Txn. Date, Booking Credit, Payment Methods, Handling Fee, and Merchant Fee
Notes to amend: Used to cross-check human input against SINGs

What the system checks: SINGs gross total is compared with TT gross total
Notes to amend: Shows where human input differs from actual receipts

What the system checks: SINGs gross total is compared with Traveltek Total Amount Paid only
Trusted for calculations?: SINGs trusted, Traveltek paid comparison only
Notes to amend: SINGs does not hold the full amount due, so it is not compared with Traveltek Total Cost

What the system checks: Bank transaction date is required and at least one money field must exist
Result / Flag shown: Bank transaction row or rejected row
Notes to amend: Use this for actual trust balance

What the system checks: Bank transactions are checked for duplicates
Notes to amend: Duplicate matching uses date, description, money in/out, balance, account type, and reference

What the system checks: Booking references in bank description or transaction reference are matched where possible
Notes to amend: Unmatched bank lines need review

What the system checks: Latest trust bank balance is used as actual trust balance when available
Notes to amend: If no trust account label exists, latest balance with any balance may be used

What the system checks: Net trust receipts equal customer gross receipts minus card fees
Notes to amend: Uses SINGs only for customer receipts

What the system checks: Booking trust balance equals net trust receipts minus supplier payments minus refunds paid
Notes to amend: Shows booking-level trust position

What the system checks: Required trust balance equals positive booking balances plus unpaid refunds plus unmatched customer receipts
Notes to amend: Margin is not automatically released in MVP

Source / Upload Type: Bank statement and required trust balance
What the system checks: Trust variance equals actual trust bank balance minus required trust balance
Notes to amend: Negative variance is a trust shortfall risk

What the system checks: Bookings are marked incomplete if SINGs data, supplier data, fee data, or commission data is missing
Notes to amend: Useful before relying on final trust/profit results

What the system checks: Refunds are matched to bookings where possible and unpaid refund amount is calculated
Notes to amend: Unpaid refunds increase required trust balance

What the system checks: Overdue refunds are flagged
Notes to amend: Due date needs to be populated for this to work well

What the system checks: Commission rows are matched to bookings by booking ref
Notes to amend: Commission is a real booking cost

What the system checks: Cancelled booking with commission still due is flagged
Notes to amend: Helps stop commission being paid incorrectly

What the system checks: Insurance cost rows are matched to bookings by booking reference
Notes to amend: Insurance is treated as a booking cost

What the system checks: Unmatched active insurance costs are flagged
Notes to amend: Active/cancelled insurance status wording may need expanding

Source / Upload Type: Bookings, SINGs fees, commission, refunds, insurance
What the system checks: True profit is calculated by the system, not imported projected profit
Notes to amend: Projected profit from master booking is not trusted

What the system checks: System generates exceptions for shortfalls, unmatched rows, duplicates, overpayments, missing data, overdue refunds, ATOL issues, and estimated fees
Notes to amend: Exceptions are a work queue for Head Office

What the system checks: Snapshot records weekly values and compares them with the previous snapshot
Result / Flag shown: New, cancelled, completed, changed value/payment/refund/commission/ATOL movement
Notes to amend: Used for week-on-week reporting

What the system checks: Excel reports can be generated for overview, trust, payments, supplier liability, refunds, commission, profitability, ATOL, movement, and exceptions

What the system checks: Manual or scheduled weekly email can send summary figures and reports to recipients
